subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render thou thanks unto the Lord, the Most Pure, that from the frail element of womanhood He hath raised up handmaids who are embodiments of divine truths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر یزدان پاک را که از عنصر ضعیف نساء اماای مبعوث فرمود و حقائق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
